name: codex-hud
description: Multiline local context HUD for Codex CLI sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Show a multiline local context HUD for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD adds a script-backed skill that summarizes Codex config, git state, project hints, hooks, and runtime context in a compact multiline view. It can also feed a patched Codex TUI status-line command.
defaultPrompt: Explain what my Codex HUD is showing.
